ocr_findings.detail: JP surface forms '絶対バス' and '相対バス' should be '絶対パス' and '相対パス' (ハ→パ OCR error in cleaned stage; the raw OCR also shows 'バス'). ZH/EN correctly render as 绝对路径/相对路径 and Absolute Path/Relative Path, so semantic information is preserved, but JP entity surface is wrong. Recommend fixing in cleaned-stage or adding a post-clean rule.
Section headers '11. 11章 / 12. 12章 / 13. 13章' are awkwardly duplicated; '11-規格. 規格' likewise. Cosmetic structural artifact, not a content defect.
